title: Cadetia albiflora
taxonomy: Cadetia albiflora is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. The genus Cadetia is a part of the subtribe Gynopodium, which is a subgroup within the tribe Maxillarieae. This classification suggests that Cadetia albiflora is closely related to other orchid species within the same subtribe and family. The specific classification of Cadetia albiflora allows for a deeper understanding of its evolutionary relationships and unique characteristics.
